name: Caribbean Jerk Marinade
recipeIngredient: 3 jalapeno chiles, stems and seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture over pork cutlets, pork tenderloin, boneless skinless chicken breast halves, or chicken or pork cubes for kabobs.
4. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes to marinate.
5. Makes 1/3 cup—enough for 4 servings of meat.
